Product details

About this item

  • Veterinarians Recommend IAMS: This IAMS Dog food Recipe is made with real chicken as the #1 ingredient and contains no fillers or artificial flavors; ingredients are natural as defined by the Association of American Feed Control Officials (AAFCO)
  • Tailored For Large Breed Dogs: This IAMS dog food dry recipe is crafted with kibble that is specially designed for large breed dogs and helps support whole-body health and vitality
  • Healthy Bones & Joints: IAMS large breed dog food Proactive Health Large Breed Adult Dry Dog Food Chicken and Rice Recipe is formulated with optimal calcium levels to help support healthy bones & joints, plus natural sources of glucosamine and chondroitin
  • Supports Strong Muscles: IAMS dog food large breed supports strong muscles with high-quality protein sourced from chicken & egg, making it an excellent choice for maintaining muscle health in large breed dogs
  • The Proactive 5 Difference: The Proactive 5 health benefits for IAMS Large Dog Food are scientifically designed to support five key areas of your dog's health, keeping them full of life, for more of life

Product Description

Veterinarians recommend IAMS. This dog food IAMS is known for its commitment to providing wholesome, healthy meals for your pet. IAMS Proactive Health Adult Large Breed Dry Dog Food Chicken & Rice Recipe is made with real chicken as the #1 ingredient and contains no fillers or artificial flavors; ingredients are natural as defined by the Association of American Feed Control Officials (AAFCO). The Proactive 5 health benefits for IAMS Healthy Adult diets focus on five key health areas: healthy muscles, energy, digestion, immune system, and skin and coat. IAMS large breed dog food supports a healthy heart with 7 essential nutrients. This recipe for daily feeding is crafted with kibble that is specially designed for large breed dogs and helps support whole-body health and vitality. With high-quality protein sourced from chicken & egg, this IAMS dry dog food recipe supports strong muscles, which is essential for maintaining the strength and agility of your large breed adult dogs. Formulated with optimal calcium levels to help support healthy bones and joints and including natural sources of glucosamine and chondroitin, this large breed dog food recipe helps to keep your dog’s skeletal structure strong and resilient. As a digestive care dog food, it is tailored with a blend of natural fiber & prebiotics for healthy digestion, promoting a healthy gut. Wholesome grains provide essential nutrients & carbohydrates for healthy energy, giving your dog the vitality they need to enjoy their day. IAMS Proactive Health Large Breed dog food is a reliable choice for large breed dog owners looking to support their dog's overall health and well-being.

Important information

Indications

Support Bones. Joints.

Ingredients

Chicken, Ground Barley, Ground Whole Grain Corn, Ground Whole Grain Sorghum, Chicken By-product Meal (Source Of Glucosamine and Chondroitin Sulfate), Soybean Meal, Dried Plain Beet Pulp, Natural Flavors, Chicken Fat (preserved with Mixed Tocopherols), Dried Egg Product, Flaxseed, Caramel Color, Calcium Carbonate, Carrots, Potassium Chloride, Fructooligosaccharides, Choline Chloride, Dicalcium Phosphate, Vitamins (Vitamin E Supplement, Ascorbic Acid, D-Calcium Pantothenate, Biotin, Thiamine Mononitrate (Vitamin B1), Vitamin B12 Supplement, Vitamin A Supplement, Niacin, Riboflavin Supplement (Vitamin B2), Pyridoxine Hydrochloride (Vitamin B6), Vitamin D3 Supplement, Folic Acid), Minerals (Ferrous Sulfate, Zinc Oxide, Sodium Selenite, Manganese Sulfate, Copper Sulfate, Potassium Iodide, Manganous Oxide), Mixed Tocopherols (preservative), Citric Acid (preservative), Rosemary Extract.

Directions

100% Complete & Balanced for Adult Maintenance Recommended Daily Feeding Guide For Adult Dogs Weight Of Dog Amount Per Day Mix It Up Dogs Love It lbs kg c g Replace 1 1/4 cup for each can of IAMS Classic Ground with Chicken & Whole Grain Rice (369g can) 50 23 2 2/3 - 3 265 - 298 60 27 3 - 3 1/2 298 - 348 70 32 3 1/2 - 4 348 - 397 80 36 3 3/4 - 4 1/3 373 - 431 100 45 4 1/2 - 5 1/4 447 - 522 120 54 5 1/4 - 6 522 - 596 140 64 5 3/4 - 6 2/3 571 - 662 lbs = pounds kg = kilograms c = cups g = grams 1 c = 99 g Feeding Guidelines: These guideline amounts are a starting point and your dog may need more food depending upon age, activity and temperament. In order to reach optimal body condition, you may need to adjust food intake. This represents the total recommended volume of food per day. You should divide the total recommended feeding amount by the number of times you feed your dog per day to get the actual portion size per feeding. • Large breed puppies, reaching 51 - 90 lbs. at maturity, should transition to IAMS Proactive Health Large Breed Adult recipe at 18 months of age. Giant breed puppies, over 90 lbs. at maturity, should transition to IAMS Proactive Health Large Breed Adult recipe at 24 months of age • Remember to have clean, fresh water available for your dog at all times. • Because IAMS Proactive Health Large Breed Dog Food is complete and balanced for adult dogs, you do not need to add vitamin or mineral supplements. • When introducing IAMS Proactive Health Dog Food, gradually mix it with your dog's current food over the course of 4 days.

How customer reviews and ratings work

Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon
Sponsored

Customers say

Customers find this dog food delicious and good value for money, noting it's sized well for large breeds with bigger chunks. The product receives positive feedback for its nutritional benefits, helping dogs stay healthy and strong, and customers report no issues with their pets. However, palatability and stomach irritation receive mixed reviews - while some dogs enjoy it, others are picky eaters, and some experience diarrhea and vomiting.

Customers report that their dogs enjoy the taste of this dog food.

"...But my new Husky/Shepherd Mix is turning up his nose to it. It's a great value and vet recommended, but my picky dog doesn't like it...." Read more
"This product is a good value when ordering a large bag. My greyhound prefers it to the comparable Science Diet product." Read more

Customers find this dog food nutritious and healthy, providing sufficient nourishment for their pets, with one customer noting that their dog has a healthy coat.
"...a couple of years back didn't det well with me, but he is happy and healthy. So, I'll keep getting it for him." Read more

"...are high quality, and I like that it provides complete and balanced nutrition...." Read more

Customers appreciate the size of the dog food, noting that it is well-suited for large breeds, with bigger chunks specifically designed for larger dogs.
"Rigs loves it ordered it online and it’s the right size for a big dog" Read more
"Great stuff for short haired large dogs: When muscling matters to the conformation. Perfect stools everytime, and the guys like it." Read more

"Our dog didn't like it Pieces too big Was constantly puking after eating too fast Switched to another brand" Read more
31 customers mention digestion, 29 positive, 2 negative31 customers mention "Digestion"29 positive2 negative
Customers report positive experiences with their dogs' digestion on this dog food, with multiple customers noting their pets have no digestive issues. One customer specifically mentions it helps their greyhound's digestive system, while another notes consistent bowel habits.
"...switching, my dog has more energy, a healthier-looking coat, and good digestion...." Read more
"...He has no stomach issues, his stool is now normal and no vomiting...." Read more
"My dogs just love it and no digestion issues that you often have with lesser quality dog foods." Read more
"...with the puppy and switched when he turned 13 months old and no digestive issues at all." Read more

"...No problems and he's excited about eating again! I think he was getting bored with his old food." Read more
"Reliable product. Dog loves it." Read more

  • mo
    5.0 out of 5 stars Great dog food brand!
    Reviewed in the United States on January 14, 2026
    Flavor Name: Chicken & RiceSize: 40 Pound (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase
    IAMS dog food has been great for my dog. The ingredients are high quality, and I like that it provides complete and balanced nutrition. Since switching, my dog has more energy, a healthier-looking coat, and good digestion. My dog enjoys the taste and finishes every meal, which wasn’t always the case with other brands. It’s a reliable brand I trust and a great value for the quality. I would definitely recommend IAMS to other dog owners.

They’re healthy being feed this food a lot of their adult life (also on occasion - Victor dry dog food but has gotten way too $$$) Good Digestion; no vomiting, Good solid Poopies, Good skin, etc.

    4.0 out of 5 stars Good buy
    Reviewed in the United States on September 27, 2025
    Flavor Name: Chicken & RiceSize: 30 Pound (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase
    I have 4 small dogs, I used to give them the ones for small breeds but they seem to like the larger kibbles. I have been buying this specific brand and type for nearly a year now and my dogs just loves it. I have never noticed any digestive issues or noticed that my dogs are not enjoying their food. The kibbles are just the perfect size for them and it looks fresh until the bottom of the bag. If there’s any downside, I would say it would be how the product smells, but it could just be me. I’m just really sensitive to strong scents.

About this Item

  • Veterinarians Recommend IAMS: This IAMS Dog food Recipe is made with real chicken as the #1 ingredient and contains no fillers or artificial flavors; ingredients are natural as defined by the Association of American Feed Control Officials (AAFCO)
  • Tailored For Large Breed Dogs: This IAMS dog food dry recipe is crafted with kibble that is specially designed for large breed dogs and helps support whole-body health and vitality
  • Healthy Bones & Joints: IAMS large breed dog food Proactive Health Large Breed Adult Dry Dog Food Chicken and Rice Recipe is formulated with optimal calcium levels to help support healthy bones & joints, plus natural sources of glucosamine and chondroitin
  • Supports Strong Muscles: IAMS dog food large breed supports strong muscles with high-quality protein sourced from chicken & egg, making it an excellent choice for maintaining muscle health in large breed dogs
  • The Proactive 5 Difference: The Proactive 5 health benefits for IAMS Large Dog Food are scientifically designed to support five key areas of your dog's health, keeping them full of life, for more of life

Product Description

Veterinarians recommend IAMS. This dog food IAMS is known for its commitment to providing wholesome, healthy meals for your pet. IAMS Proactive Health Adult Large Breed Dry Dog Food Chicken & Rice Recipe is made with real chicken as the #1 ingredient and contains no fillers or artificial flavors; ingredients are natural as defined by the Association of American Feed Control Officials (AAFCO). The Proactive 5 health benefits for IAMS Healthy Adult diets focus on five key health areas: healthy muscles, energy, digestion, immune system, and skin and coat. IAMS large breed dog food supports a healthy heart with 7 essential nutrients. This recipe for daily feeding is crafted with kibble that is specially designed for large breed dogs and helps support whole-body health and vitality. With high-quality protein sourced from chicken & egg, this IAMS dry dog food recipe supports strong muscles, which is essential for maintaining the strength and agility of your large breed adult dogs. Formulated with optimal calcium levels to help support healthy bones and joints and including natural sources of glucosamine and chondroitin, this large breed dog food recipe helps to keep your dog’s skeletal structure strong and resilient. As a digestive care dog food, it is tailored with a blend of natural fiber & prebiotics for healthy digestion, promoting a healthy gut. Wholesome grains provide essential nutrients & carbohydrates for healthy energy, giving your dog the vitality they need to enjoy their day. IAMS Proactive Health Large Breed dog food is a reliable choice for large breed dog owners looking to support their dog's overall health and well-being.

Options Available

Flavor Name

  • Chicken & Rice
  • Lamb & Rice

Size

  • 15 Pound (Pack of 1)
  • 30 Pound (Pack of 1)
  • 38.5 Pound (Pack of 1)
  • 40 Pound (Pack of 1)
Browse all available options

Important Information

Indications

Support Bones. Joints.

Ingredients

Chicken, Ground Barley, Ground Whole Grain Corn, Ground Whole Grain Sorghum, Chicken By-product Meal (Source Of Glucosamine and Chondroitin Sulfate), Soybean Meal, Dried Plain Beet Pulp, Natural Flavors, Chicken Fat (preserved with Mixed Tocopherols), Dried Egg Product, Flaxseed, Caramel Color, Calcium Carbonate, Carrots, Potassium Chloride, Fructooligosaccharides, Choline Chloride, Dicalcium Phosphate, Vitamins (Vitamin E Supplement, Ascorbic Acid, D-Calcium Pantothenate, Biotin, Thiamine Mononitrate (Vitamin B1), Vitamin B12 Supplement, Vitamin A Supplement, Niacin, Riboflavin Supplement (Vitamin B2), Pyridoxine Hydrochloride (Vitamin B6), Vitamin D3 Supplement, Folic Acid), Minerals (Ferrous Sulfate, Zinc Oxide, Sodium Selenite, Manganese Sulfate, Copper Sulfate, Potassium Iodide, Manganous Oxide), Mixed Tocopherols (preservative), Citric Acid (preservative), Rosemary Extract.

Directions

100% Complete & Balanced for Adult Maintenance Recommended Daily Feeding Guide For Adult Dogs Weight Of Dog Amount Per Day Mix It Up Dogs Love It lbs kg c g Replace 1 1/4 cup for each can of IAMS Classic Ground with Chicken & Whole Grain Rice (369g can) 50 23 2 2/3 - 3 265 - 298 60 27 3 - 3 1/2 298 - 348 70 32 3 1/2 - 4 348 - 397 80 36 3 3/4 - 4 1/3 373 - 431 100 45 4 1/2 - 5 1/4 447 - 522 120 54 5 1/4 - 6 522 - 596 140 64 5 3/4 - 6 2/3 571 - 662 lbs = pounds kg = kilograms c = cups g = grams 1 c = 99 g Feeding Guidelines: These guideline amounts are a starting point and your dog may need more food depending upon age, activity and temperament. In order to reach optimal body condition, you may need to adjust food intake. This represents the total recommended volume of food per day. You should divide the total recommended feeding amount by the number of times you feed your dog per day to get the actual portion size per feeding. • Large breed puppies, reaching 51 - 90 lbs. at maturity, should transition to IAMS Proactive Health Large Breed Adult recipe at 18 months of age. Giant breed puppies, over 90 lbs. at maturity, should transition to IAMS Proactive Health Large Breed Adult recipe at 24 months of age • Remember to have clean, fresh water available for your dog at all times. • Because IAMS Proactive Health Large Breed Dog Food is complete and balanced for adult dogs, you do not need to add vitamin or mineral supplements. • When introducing IAMS Proactive Health Dog Food, gradually mix it with your dog's current food over the course of 4 days.
